info.value: Qian Zhongshu is one of the most famous Chinese writers. He was born on November 21, 1910 in Wuxi, Jiangsu Province. He lived with his uncle when he was very young. When he was a little boy, his uncle often took him to teahouses. He liked reading storybooks in his free time. In 1929, he went to Tsinghua University. Although he failed his math test, he entered the university because he was good at Chinese and English. In 1947, his most famous novel Fortress Besieged came out. It has been translated into more than six foreign languages. He died of illness on December 19, 1998. He was 88 years old then.
info.analyze: 你将听到David介绍钱钟书的短文，录音播放两遍。请根据所听到的内容，选择思维导图中的正确信息（二选一），在50秒钟内转述钱钟书的相关信息（包含五个要点的内容）。</br>现在，你有15秒钟的时间阅读思维导图。</br> Qian Zhongshu is one of the most famous Chinese writers.
